import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "name": string;
  "sku": string;
  "price": number;
  "stock": number;
  "stockLevel": number;
  "category": string;
  "rating": number;
  "status": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Product Catalog",
  "description": "Manage your product inventory.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 10,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "showPageSizeSelector": true,
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    25,
    50
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": true,
  "enableColumnVisibility": true,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": true,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": true,
  "enableColumnResize": true,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": true,
  "enableFooter": true,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "name",
      "label": "Product",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "resizable": true,
      "width": 220
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "sku",
      "label": "SKU",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "resizable": true,
      "width": 120
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "price",
      "label": "Price",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "aggregation": "avg",
      "footerLabel": "Avg"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "stock",
      "label": "Stock",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "stockLevel",
      "label": "Level",
      "type": "progress",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "category",
      "label": "Category",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Electronics": "default",
        "Clothing": "secondary",
        "Books": "outline",
        "Food": "default"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "rating",
      "label": "Rating",
      "type": "rating",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c8",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Active": "default",
        "Draft": "secondary",
        "Archived": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c9",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
